channel.title: GNmaster
channel.description: This is a randomly ordered feed of the most recent entries from GNmaster, skipping any feeds with errors.

item.title: What Happens to Your Body When You Drink Enough Water
Weekly Meal Plan #86
item.description: Another week, another lineup of easy dinners to make your life a little simpler. This weekly meal plan is full…

item.title: Meghan Trainor on Building Confidence and Healthy Habits
item.description: Meghan shares how she’s tuning out criticism, prioritizing her health, and building habits that help her feel stronger than ever.

item.title: 8 Ways to Get the Protein You Need
They Wanted to Join Raya. They’ve Been on the Waiting List for Years
item.description: Getting into Raya, the exclusive members-only dating app, has become nearly impossible for some. We met people who have waited as long as two, five, a...

item.title: DeepSeek previews new AI model that ‘closes the gap’ with frontier models
item.description: DeepSeek says both models are more efficient and performant than DeepSeek V3.2 due to architectural improvements, and have almost "closed the gap" wit...

item.title: Another spyware maker caught distributing fake Android snooping apps
item.description: Researchers have found a new case where government authorities used a fake Android app to plant spyware on a target’s phone. The company that allegedl...

item.title: Millions of Americans May Now Also Be Considered Canadian Under a New Law
item.description: Millions of Americans who have a Canadian parent, grandparent, or even a great-grandparent, will be eligible to apply for citizenship under a new law....

item.title: ‘Mummified’ Fossil Shows 289 Million-yo Skin, Scales, Proteins, and Earliest Known Lung Function
item.description: Every breath you take is part of a very ancient story, a remarkably preserved reptile that died in an Oklahoma cave about 289 million years ago has re...

item.title: VMax New V4 Electric Scooter Review: Unleash the Beast
item.description: VMax's new electric scooter has a secret menu that lets you unlock the top speed and engage cruise control.

item.title: In another wild turn for AI chips, Meta signs deal for millions of Amazon AI CPUs
item.description: Meta has commandeered a big chunk of Amazon's homegrown CPUs (not GPUs) for AI agentic workloads, signaling that a new kind of chip race has begun.

item.title: Nothing introduces an AI-powered dictation tool
item.description: Nothing's new on-device dictation tool supports over 100 languages.

item.title: The Best Cordless Vacuums for Your Whole House (2026)
item.description: Clean your house without the constraint of a power cord with these cordless stick vacuums.

item.title: Dyson PencilVac Review (2026): Limited but Handy
item.description: Dyson’s newest stick vacuum has a fresh, streamlined look and some limitations. But I still keep reaching for it.

item.title: Uber CTO Praveen Neppalli Naga joins stacked StrictlyVC SF lineup for April 30 event
item.description: Surprise! StrictlyVC San Francisco, which will kick off this year’s events lineup for TechCrunch on April 30 at the Sentro Filipino Cultural Center, i...

item.title: Best Merino Wool T-Shirts (2026): Ibex, Icebreaker, Unbound Merino
item.description: These merino wool tees are the last shirts you’ll ever wear. I’m wearing one right now.

item.title: Lufthansa's first Airbus A380 with upgraded business class debuts on flight to LAX
item.description: Lufthansa's first Airbus A380 with a new business class cabin entered service on Thursday flying between Munich and Los Angeles.

item.title: 9 European summer destinations to beat the heat
item.description: Hop on the "coolcation" trend and visit these European destinations offering milder summers.

item.title: Could a jet fuel shortage really ruin your summer trip to Europe? What flyers should know
item.description: Concerns over a growing shortage of jet fuel on the continent have raised fears about potential flight cancellations if things don’t improve.

item.title: Last chance: Earn $250 bonus cash back with the Chase Freedom Unlimited
item.description: These welcome offers on the Chase Freedom Flex and the Chase Freedom Unlimited make them compelling options. Is now the right time to apply?

item.title: 10 'coolest' vacation spots to escape the heat this summer
item.description: Whether you want to hike, ski or eat your way through top restaurants, here are 10 of the best destinations to escape the heat this summer.

item.title: Seeds Can ‘Hear’ the Rain–And the Sound Waves Make Them Grow Faster Shows MIT Study
item.description: Seeds may come alive to the soothing sound of rainfall, sensing the drops while they are still beneath the surface, suggests a new study. A series of ...

item.title: After Hiker Falls From Cliff, Dog is Left Behind Shivering Until Pilot Crowdfunds for Rescue Flight to Reunite Them
item.description: Jessica Johnston was lucky to have survived after plummeting from the top of a 180-foot waterfall while hiking in the mountains. But when she lost her...

item.title: Girl Spots Endangered Axolotl Under a Bridge in Wales and Family Mounts Extraordinary Rescue
item.description: A mom was left stunned when her 10-year-old daughter spotted a critically-endangered axolotl under a bridge in Wales—an exciting moment that made the ...

item.description: I’m updating my “Tuesday night dinner that feels like we’re in Hawaii” with double the sauce! You guys asked, so…

item.description: This Skirt Steak Marinade is the kind of marinade that makes you feel like you know what you’re doing with…

item.description: Move over, Ranch, there’s a new creamy dressing in town that’s stealing our hearts! This cheesy jalapeño cashew dressing is our new go-to for salads, ...

item.description: We arrived in Beijing expecting chaos: traffic, horns, overwhelming noise, the stereotypical capital rush. What we found instead was a city that felt ...

item.title: 63 Essential Things to Know Before Visiting Tokyo
item.description: From trains to table manners, these are the lessons Tokyo quietly teaches travellers. They’re practical, cultural, and often invisible until you get t...

item.title: What grocery stores reveal about how people eat
item.description: A grocery store is one of the most revealing places you can walk into when travelling. More than restaurants or cafés, it shows how people actually ea...

item.title: What is considered a “normal meal” in different cultures
item.description: People often search for a “normal meal” when they arrive somewhere new. Something familiar enough to feel grounding, but local enough to feel authenti...

item.title: Jobless claims fall to lowest level since mid-May
Jobless claims stay low in latest week
Consumer credit growth soars in December
U.S. productivity slows down in fourth quarter while unit labor costs accelerate
Beyond to buy rights to Buy Buy Baby brand and reunite it with Bed Bath & Beyond
